channel.title: Cdrom on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Cdrom on My Linux Journey

item.title: QEMU Windows XP - Mount Multiple CD-ROMs Tutorial
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to installing Windows XP in QEMU with multiple CD-ROMs. Covers ISO mounting, IDE configuration, and driver installation for multi-disc setups.
